mapper.sql: id, produce_plan_id, job_id, job_process_id, report_log_id, stock_out_id, stock_out_item_id, batch_no, order_id, process_id, process_name, material_id, material_code, material_name, material_type, bom_qty, actual_qty, standard_loss_rate, limit_loss_qty, actual_loss_qty, is_over_limit, over_limit_reason, approval_status, approval_by_id, approval_by_name, approval_time, approval_remark, unit, unit_price, theoretical_cost, actual_cost, cost_diff, unit_cost, cost_amount, event_source, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_produce_material_consume ( produce_plan_id, job_id, job_process_id, report_log_id, stock_out_id, stock_out_item_id, batch_no, order_id, process_id, process_name, material_id, material_code, material_name, material_type, bom_qty, actual_qty, standard_loss_rate, limit_loss_qty, actual_loss_qty, is_over_limit, over_limit_reason, approval_status, approval_by_id, approval_by_name, approval_time, approval_remark, unit, unit_price, theoretical_cost, actual_cost, cost_diff, unit_cost, cost_amount, event_source, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{producePlanId}, #{jobId}, #{jobProcessId}, #{reportLogId}, #{stockOutId}, #{stockOutItemId}, #{batchNo}, #{orderId}, #{processId}, #{processName}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialType}, #{bomQty}, #{actualQty}, #{standardLossRate}, #{limitLossQty}, #{actualLossQty}, #{isOverLimit}, #{overLimitReason}, #{approvalStatus}, #{approvalById}, #{approvalByName}, #{approvalTime}, #{approvalRemark}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{theoreticalCost}, #{actualCost}, #{costDiff}, #{unitCost}, #{costAmount}, #{eventSource}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_erp_produce_material_consume WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_erp_produce_material_consume WHERE produce_plan_id = #{producePlanId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_produce_material_consume WHERE approval_status = '1'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN is_over_limit = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overLimitCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingApprovalCount FROM t_erp_produce_material_consume
